component.name: Job Summary Card
component.description: Compact earnings breakdown for a job: section label, line items (Revenue, Materials, optional Fees), and a bordered Net Earnings total. Line copy and amounts are driven by props / instance text, not structural variants.

layoutSemantics.Default (3 lines): Revenue, Materials, Fees rows; net total in Semantic/Status/Success/Text.
layoutSemantics.2 Lines: Revenue and Materials only; net total green (positive).
layoutSemantics.Negative: Includes Fees row; net total uses Brand/Primary with negative prefix.

codeProps.title: optional; default Earnings Summary
codeProps.revenue: label, value, optional valuePrefix, optional valueTone
codeProps.total: label (default Net Earnings), value, valuePrefix optional, sentiment positive|negative

notes: 2026-03-28: Figma variant axis renamed from `Property 1` to `Layout`.
Figma ‘Inter’ on currency glyph is cosmetic; implementation uses Ubuntu Sans Mono via Typography/Body for prefix + amount.
